privacy.note: Minimal data collection. No third-party ad tracking. No cookie consent banners (minimal cookie use — session auth only). No analytics scripts. Privacy-positive design.

tos.note: Not directly evaluated. No modifier applied.

accessibility.note: No accessibility statement. Plain HTML table-based layout. No ARIA landmarks or skip-to-content links. Faded comments create contrast issues. Functional but not accessible.

mission.note: Platform for intellectual curiosity. 'Anything that good hackers would find interesting.' Anti-flamebait, anti-ragebait ethos. Depth over engagement metrics.

editorial_code.note: Published community guidelines. Detailed FAQ. Active human moderation (dang, tomhow). Guidelines emphasize intellectual curiosity, substantive discussion, good faith, civility. Community vouching system.

ownership.note: Y Combinator (venture capital). Spun out with full editorial independence. YC receives job ad placement and startup visibility. For-profit parent but editorially independent.

access_model.note: No paywall. No registration to read. Free account creation (no email required). API publicly available. RSS available. Complete open access.

ad_tracking.note: Zero third-party advertising. Zero ad networks. Only YC startup job ads (non-tracking). No analytics scripts. No behavioral tracking. Minimal JavaScript.

scores.note: Discussion centers on human heritage and genetic diversity. Viking study challenges ethno-nationalist narratives. S: open forum. Mission modifier +0.10.
Study: 'Viking was a job, not heredity' — diverse genetic backgrounds participated as equals. Non-Scandinavian and Saami individuals in Viking burials. Equality as historical reality.

Central finding: diverse genetic backgrounds (Southern European, British Isles, Saami, East Asian/Siberian) among Vikings. Challenges racial essentialism. Comments discuss identity politics implications. S: guidelines enforce civility. Accessibility modifier -0.05.
No content on life, liberty, or security in modern rights sense.
Tangential: Viking raiding involved enslavement (historical context). Salme burial of 41 males after battle. Very weak signal.
No content on torture or degrading treatment.
No content on legal personhood.
No content on equality before law.
No content on right to remedy.
No content on arbitrary detention.
No content on fair hearing.
No content on presumption of innocence.

S-only. HN: zero third-party tracking, zero ad networks, zero analytics scripts, minimal cookies (session auth only). No cookie banner needed. Exemplary privacy practice among commercial platforms. Privacy +0.10, ad/tracking +0.10 = +0.20.
No content on freedom of movement.
No content on asylum.
Norse identity was occupational/cultural, not ethnic. Comments discuss nationality as constructed. Icelandic speakers note 'Viking' was never an ethnonym. Indirect.
No content on marriage or family.
No content on property rights.

Multiple perspectives debated openly. Comments challenge and refine article thesis. Scientific thinking applied to cultural questions. S: guidelines protect intellectual curiosity and substantive disagreement.

E: 139 comments with diverse perspectives (historical, genetic, linguistic, political). Source criticism present. S: open platform, no registration to read, voting for quality, community vouching. Context: ed. code +0.10, ownership +0.05, access +0.15 = +0.30 (at cap).
S-only. HN is a functioning assembly — 139 commenters in open discourse. Community self-governance through voting and vouching. Guidelines protect right to participate. No registration fee.
S-only. Community governance: voting, flagging, vouching (Modnesty). Karma-based privileges. Some participatory governance, though moderator-controlled.
No content on social security or cultural rights.
No content on work or equal pay.
S-only. Noprocrast feature: users can limit site access time (20 min on, 180 min off). Anti-addictive design respecting rest/leisure needs. Unusual among social platforms.
No content on standard of living.

E: genuinely educational — ancient DNA methodology, Viking Age chronology, Norse etymology, genetic vs cultural identity, settlement patterns. Corrects misconceptions. S: freely accessible. Accessibility modifier -0.05.

Vikings as culturally (not genetically) defined community. 442 genomes sequenced — massive scientific collaboration. Discussion engages with cultural heritage questions. S: platform shares scientific findings freely.
No content on social or international order.

S-only. Guidelines frame community duties: 'maintain kindness and curiosity,' 'reply substantively,' 'assume good faith,' 'flag rather than engage.' Active moderation. Prohibition against upvote solicitation.
S-only. Guidelines protect against rights destruction on platform: no dismissing others' work, no ideological battles, vouching restores removed content. Anti-abuse systems.
